meaning: n.哥特人,粗野的人,野蛮人
examples: Like Goth, steampunk draws on elements of Victorian dress.
Japanese street fashion added a new, surprising look: goth ninja.
People in the goth scene are extremely friendly and accepting of others.
The change in Manchester came after the murder of 20-year-old goth Sophie Lancaster in 2007.
The goth style draws on horror imagery, and both sexes often favour a 'feminine' style.
